title: erigeron glaucus
intro: Erigeron glaucus, also known as sea sea salt and frost plant, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Erigeron glaucus include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Erigeron glaucus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
